# HAWK. Cybersecurity for US dental, legal, and CPA practices

HAWK is an attack surface management (ASM) SaaS built for US small and medium practices. The core product scans domains for exposure, surfaces findings mapped to the US framework that applies to each vertical, and ships a Breach Response Guarantee with every tier.

## What HAWK does
- Scans domains for exposed attack surfaces
- Detects lookalike and typosquat domains targeting your brand
- Checks if your business credentials have been breached (HaveIBeenPwned)
- Monitors SPF, DKIM, and DMARC email security records
- Generates vertical aware US compliance PDF reports (HIPAA, FTC Safeguards, or ABA Formal Opinion 24-514)

## Pricing
HAWK Core at $249 per month, HAWK Guard at $449 per month, HAWK Sentinel at $799 per month. All tiers in USD. Each tier includes the Breach Response Guarantee ($250K on Core, $1M on Guard, $2.5M on Sentinel).

## Who it's for
US dental and medical practices (HIPAA Security Rule and HHS OCR breach notification), US CPA, accounting, and tax practices (FTC Safeguards Rule and the May 2024 breach notification amendment), US law firms and solo attorneys (ABA Formal Opinion 24-514 and Model Rules 1.1, 1.4, 1.6), and any US small business that handles sensitive customer data.

## Company
Built by AKB Studios (akbstudios.com). Contact: hello@akbstudios.com
